\tzpentry{ID5608}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5608 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g(\theta,\phi)=\sum_k a_k\,\operatorname{Re}!\bigl[Y_{\ell_k m_k}(\theta,\phi)\bigr], \end{equation}
